stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct when two vectors are added in order to give a resultant vector?

options.a: The tail of one vector is added to the head of the other vector.
options.b: The vectors can be added together in any configuration.
options.c: The head of one vector is added to the head of the other vector.
options.d: The tail of one vector is added to the tail of the other vector.
